015 */
016package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
017
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.UserNotFoundException;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.UserProfileRepository;
021import java.net.URL;
022import java.util.List;
023import java.util.NoSuchElementException;
024import java.util.Optional;
025import java.util.UUID;
026import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
027import org.springframework.security.core.context.SecurityContextHolder;
028import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
029
030/**
031 * Implementation of {@link UserService} providing business logic for user profile operations.
032 * This service handles OAuth2-based user identification and creation, as well as profile updates.
033 */
034@Service
035public class UserServiceImpl implements UserService {
036
037  private static final String OAUTH_SUB_CLAIM = "sub";
038  private static final String OAUTH_NAME_CLAIM = "name";
039
040  private final UserProfileRepository repository;
041
042  /**
043   * Constructs an instance of {@code AbstractUserService} with the specified repository.
044   *
045   * @param repository User profile repository for persistence operations.
046   */
047  @Autowired
048  public UserServiceImpl(UserProfileRepository repository) {
049    this.repository = repository;
050  }
051
052  @Override
053  public UserProfile getCurrentUser() {
054    //noinspection DataFlowIssue
055    return (UserProfile) SecurityContextHolder
056        .getContext()
057        .getAuthentication()
058        .getPrincipal();
059  }
060
061  @Override
062  public Optional<UserProfile> get(Long id) {
063    return repository.findById(id);
064  }
065
066  @Override
067  public UserProfile getOrCreate(String oauthKey, UserProfile userProfile) {
068    return repository
069        .findByOauthKey(oauthKey)
070        .orElseGet(() -> {
071          userProfile.setOauthKey(oauthKey);
072          return repository.save(userProfile);
073        });
074  }
075
076  @Override
077  public UserProfile updateDisplayName(Long id, String displayName) {
078    return repository
079        .findById(id)
080        .map(user -> {
081          user.setDisplayName(displayName);
082          return repository.save(user);
083        })
084        .orElseThrow(NoSuchElementException::new);
085  }
086
087  @Override
088  public UserProfile updateEmail(Long id, String email) {
089    return repository
090        .findById(id)
091        .map(user -> {
092          user.setEmail(email);
093          return repository.save(user);
094        })
095        .orElseThrow(NoSuchElementException::new);
096  }
097
098  @Override
099  public UserProfile updateAvatar(Long id, URL avatar) {
100    return repository
101        .findById(id)
102        .map(user -> {
103          user.setAvatar(avatar);
104          return repository.save(user);
105        })
106        .orElseThrow(NoSuchElementException::new);
107  }
108
109  @Override
110  public List<UserProfile> getAll() {
111    return repository.findAll();
112  }
113
114  @Override
115  public UserProfile getMe() {
116    return getCurrentUser();
117  }
118
119  @Override
120  public Optional<UserProfile> getByExternalId(UUID externalId) {
121    return repository.findByExternalId(externalId);
122  }
123
124  @Override
125  public UserProfile setManagerStatus(UUID externalId, boolean manager) {
126    UserProfile user = repository
127        .findByExternalId(externalId)
128        .orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException("User not found: " + externalId));
129    user.setIsManager(manager);
130    return repository.save(user);
131  }
132
133  @Override
134  public UserProfile setEnabled(UUID externalId, boolean enabled) {
135    UserProfile user = repository
136        .findByExternalId(externalId)
137        .orElseThrow(() -> new UserNotFoundException("User not found: " + externalId));
138    user.setUserEnabled(enabled);
139    return repository.save(user);
140  }
141
142}
